caption: A presentation slide titled "CRYOGENIC ENGINEERING" is shown, focusing on a "Summary" of the liquid yield for a Linde – Hampson system. The slide displays a mathematical formula for the liquid yield $y$, expressed as a fraction involving enthalpy variables $h_1, h_2, h_7, h_g$ and effectiveness $\varepsilon$. Across the sequence, text is incrementally added to the slide. Initially, only the formula is present. Then, a bullet point appears stating, "As the effectiveness decreases, the yield $y$ decreases drastically." Finally, a second bullet point is added: "Furthermore, the effectiveness should be more than 85% in order to have a liquid yield in Linde Hampson cycle." The NPTEL logo is visible in the bottom left, and the footer identifies the presenter as "Prof. M D Atrey, Department of Mechanical Engineering, IIT Bombay." No people are visible in the frames.
